releases.notes: Post-Opus-audit hardening pass on top of 0.1.2. Alembic replay-safety guard, reconcile_storage removes underlying files for stale reserved artifacts, upload streams chunks instead of buffering 100 MB, double-confirm covers more destructive verbs, UpdaterProvider cleanup defends against native side replacing window.nodone mid-flight. Infrastructure release; UI polish before first official user-facing v1.
